---
title: "DS 250 Portfolio"
subtitle: "Vincent Gentry"
---

Welcome to my DS 250 Data Science Programming portfolio. This site showcases work completed throughout the course, including client reports, data visualizations, and machine learning projects.

## About Me

I am a student in DS 250 at BYU-Idaho working to develop skills in Python-based data science, including data wrangling, visualization, and predictive modeling.

## Portfolio Contents

| Section | Description |
|---|---|
| **Goals Letter** | Mid-course reflection on learning targets |
| **Unit 1** | Introduction to Python, Pandas, and data visualization |
| **Unit 2** | Data wrangling and exploratory analysis |
| **Unit 3** | Advanced visualizations and statistical summaries |
| **Unit 4** | Machine learning and predictive models |
| **Unit 5** | Star Wars Survey analysis |
